## New App Submission

**App Name**:
**App URL**:

### Checklist

- [ ] `id` is unique, lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens
- [ ] `name` is 40 chars or less
- [ ] `description` is 120 chars or less
- [ ] `icon` is HTTPS, 128x128px PNG/SVG, under 50KB
- [ ] `url` is HTTPS and live
- [ ] App works with 1AM Wallet
- [ ] `registry.json` is valid JSON
- [ ] I did NOT set `featured`
